context: Tests whether WeatherKit statistics guidance uses the current iOS 18+ variadic API shape and documented typed properties.

checklist.name: iOS 18 availability
checklist.description: States or gates WeatherKit statistics APIs as iOS 18+ or equivalent platform availability.

checklist.name: Variadic queries
checklist.description: Uses separate variadic query arguments such as including: .temperature, .precipitation rather than an array argument.

checklist.name: Tuple return order
checklist.description: Explains or demonstrates that tuple return order matches the including query order.

checklist.name: Daily statistics method
checklist.description: Uses WeatherService.dailyStatistics with a date interval or day range for daily historical statistics.

checklist.name: Daily typed properties
checklist.description: Uses documented daily statistics properties such as day, averageHighTemperature, averageLowTemperature, averagePrecipitationAmount, averageSnowfallAmount, or averagePrecipitationProbability.

checklist.name: Monthly statistics method
checklist.description: Includes a WeatherService.monthlyStatistics example for monthly historical statistics.

checklist.name: Monthly typed properties
checklist.description: Uses documented monthly statistics properties such as month, averageHighTemperature, averageLowTemperature, averagePrecipitationAmount, averageSnowfallAmount, or averagePrecipitationProbability.

checklist.name: No stale statistics helper
checklist.description: Does not use or recommend a statistics(for:) lookup or an undocumented mean property for these APIs.

checklist.name: Collection iteration
checklist.description: Treats DailyWeatherStatistics and MonthlyWeatherStatistics as typed collections that can be iterated or zipped.

checklist.name: WeatherKit scope
checklist.description: Keeps the answer focused on WeatherKit statistics modernization and does not drift into unrelated charting, persistence, or architecture work.
